revision.comment: Bot: mark 11 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:安倍泰親]] {{Infobox person|image=File:Honcho Suikoden Goketsu (BM 1973,0723,0.29 57).jpg|birth_date=1110|death_date={{death date|1183|4|14}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}}}
{{Infobox Aristocrat | Name = Abe no Yasuchika (安倍泰親) | image = | Caption = | Era = Late {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}} | Birth = [[Ten'ei]] 1 (1110) | Death = {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 2, [[3rd month, 20th day (lunar calendar)|3rd month, 20th day]] (April 14, 1183)? | Other Names = 指御子 (Sasu no Miko) | Rank = [[Shōshiinoge]] (Senior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade); [[Onmyōryō|Onmyō no Kami]]; [[Dazai no shoni|Dazai Gon no Daibu]] | Clan = {{ill|Abe clan|ja|阿倍氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe clan|qq=}} | Parentage = Father: [[Abe no Yasunaga]], Mother: {{ill|Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|ja|高階有長娘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Siblings = {{ill|Abe no Masafumi|ja|安倍政文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Masafumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Masafumi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500617}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasuari|ja|安倍泰有|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasuari|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasuari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500621}}, '''Abe no Yasuchika''', {{ill|Abe no Yasutoshi|ja|安倍泰時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500624}} | Children = {{ill|Abe no Kiyohiro|ja|安倍季弘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500627}}, {{ill|Abe no Gyōshun|ja|安倍業俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500631}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasushige|ja|安倍泰茂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasushige|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasushige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500635}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasunari|ja|安倍泰成|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunari|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500638}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasutada|ja|安倍泰忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutada|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutada|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500641}}, {{ill|Abe no Chōnaga|ja|安倍親長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Chōnaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Chōnaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500645}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasumi|ja|安倍泰明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasumi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500647}} }} '''Abe no Yasuchika''' (安倍泰親) was a {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|qid=Q134737|lt=noble|1=Nobility}} and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|qid=Q2274163|lt=onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} in the late {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}. He served as {{ill|Onmyō no Kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no Kami|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} and was a descendant of the famed onmyōji {{ill|Abe no Seimei|en|Abe no Seimei|qid=Q1150151|lt=Abe no Seimei|1=Abe no Seimei}} (five generations removed). His Rank was Shōshiinoge ([[Senior Fourth Rank]], Lower Grade), and he also held the title of {{ill|Dazai Gon no Daibu|ja|大膳権大夫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dazai Gon no Daibu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dazai Gon no Daibu|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大膳職|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大膳職}}.<ref>Concise Japanese Biographical Dictionary, 5th Edition, Sanseido, 2009, p.48.</ref> == Career == === Succession to the Abe Clan Leadership === Yasuchika's father, {{ill|Abe no Yasunaga|ja|安倍泰長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunaga|qq=}}, served as [[Onmyō no Kami]] with the Rank of [[Junior Fourth Rank|Junior Fourth Rank, Lower Grade]] until his death in [[:en:Hoan|Hoan]] 2 (1121). Yasuchika’s elder brother, {{ill|Abe no Masafumi|ja|安倍政文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Masafumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Masafumi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500617}}, succeeded their father but died unexpectedly in {{ill|Tenji|en|Tenji|qid=Q3518096|lt=Tenji|1=Tenji}} 1 (1124), leaving the Abe family leadership in jeopardy. As a result, the {{ill|Royal court|en|Royal court|qid=Q1134237|lt=Imperial Court (Japan)|1=Royal court}} selected the 15-year-old Yasuchika to lead the clan. His cousin {{ill|Abe no Kintoki|ja|安倍兼時|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kintoki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kintoki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500650}} became his guardian and teacher in [[Onmyōdō]].<ref>''{{ill|I'in Keizu|ja|医陰系図|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/I'in Keizu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/I'in Keizu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''</ref> In {{ill|Daiji|en|Daiji|qid=Q5209140|lt=Daiji|1=Daiji}} 5 (1130), Yasuchika became {{ill|Right Capital Ward Officer|ja|右京亮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Capital Ward Officer|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Right Capital Ward Officer|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=京職|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=京職}} and soon gained favor with {{ill|Retired Emperor Toba|ja|鳥羽上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retired Emperor Toba|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retired Emperor Toba|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=鳥羽天皇|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=鳥羽天皇|1=Emperor Toba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q349284}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Nariko|en|Fujiwara no Nariko|qid=Q5507535|lt=Empress Bifukumon'in|1=Fujiwara no Nariko}}. His growing influence led to a legal dispute over the Abe family estate, including the historic {{ill|Tsuchimikado Residence|ja|土御門邸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Residence|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchimikado Residence|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491358|1=Tsuchimikado-dono}}.<ref>''{{ill|Chūyūki|ja|中右記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūyūki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chūyūki|qq=}}'' and ''{{ill|Minamoto no Morotoki's Diary|lt=Minamoto no Morotoki's Diary|lt=Nagai Akimitsu's Diary|ja|長秋記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagai Akimitsu's Diary|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagai Akimitsu's Diary|qq=}}'' (entries for 1131).</ref> Yasuchika eventually reclaimed the estate after a prolonged confrontation with his former guardian Kintoki. === Rise to Fame as "Sasu no Miko" === Yasuchika excelled in [[Onmyōdō]], providing astrological guidance to {{ill|Retired Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retired Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Retired Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=後白河天皇|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=後白河天皇|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317984}}. His accurate predictions earned him the title {{nihongo|''Sasu no Miko''|指御子|qq=}}, signifying divine insight. He foretold significant events, including the [[1179 political shift|1179 coup]] and the {{ill|Jishō Rebellion|ja|治承の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jishō Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jishō Rebellion|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=治承・寿永の乱|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=治承・寿永の乱|1=Genpei War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q737542}}.<ref>''{{ill|Taiheiki|ja|台記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiheiki|qq=}}'' (entries for 1148 and 1179).</ref> His expertise extended to the {{nihongo|''Tensō''|天文奏|qq=}}, confidential reports on celestial phenomena. Portions of his journal, ''Abe no Yasuchika no Nikki'', survive today, offering insights into Heian-era {{ill|Astrology|en|Astrology|qid=Q34362|lt=Astrology|1=Astrology}}. == After Yasuchika's Death == Following Yasuchika’s death in {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 2 (1183), his sons {{ill|Abe no Kiyohiro|ja|安倍季弘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500627}} and {{ill|Abe no Gyōshun|ja|安倍業俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500631}} continued his legacy. However, internal divisions weakened the Abe clan. It was not until the {{ill|Muromachi period|en|Muromachi period|qid=Q334845|lt=Muromachi period|1=Muromachi period}} that Yasuchika's descendants reestablished the family's prominence.<ref>''{{ill|Meigetsuki|ja|明月記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meigetsuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meigetsuki|qq=}}'' (entry for 1230).</ref> == Genealogy == * Father: {{ill|Abe no Yasunaga|ja|安倍泰長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunaga|qq=}} * Mother: {{ill|Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|ja|高階有長娘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takahashi Aritaka's daughter|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Sons: {{ill|Abe no Kiyohiro|ja|安倍季弘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Kiyohiro|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500627}}, {{ill|Abe no Gyōshun|ja|安倍業俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Gyōshun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500631}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasushige|ja|安倍泰茂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasushige|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasushige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500635}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasunari|ja|安倍泰成|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunari|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasunari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500638}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasutada|ja|安倍泰忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutada|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasutada|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500641}}, {{ill|Abe no Chōnaga|ja|安倍親長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Chōnaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Chōnaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500645}}, {{ill|Abe no Yasumi|ja|安倍泰明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe no Yasumi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500647}} == Notes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * ''Kokushi Daijiten 1,'' Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, 1979. ISBN 978-4-642-00501-2 * ''Heian Jidaishi Jiten,'' Kadokawa Shoten, 1994. ISBN 978-4-04-031700-7 * Akazawa Haruhiko, ''Kamakura Period Abe Clan Developments,'' Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, 2011. ISBN 978-4-642-02893-6 {{translated page|ja|安倍泰親|version=104151094|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:安倍泰親]]
